overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a rural Japanese village, crossing a stream via wooden bridge, and climbing rocky terrain to reach a scenic overlook with a waterfall. The environment features traditional wooden architecture, lush green vegetation, and overcast lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village alley between traditional wooden houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow village path flanked by wooden buildings and dense vegetation

entered.detail: dark wooden village house with paper windows and wooden beams
wooden fence line covered in vegetation
tall poles with red banners marking the path ahead
low stone retaining wall along the path
traditional Japanese hut with straw thatched roof
traditional stone lantern along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed alley between traditional wooden village houses. Dense vegetation lines the right side while a stone wall runs along the left. Red banner poles are visible in the distance, and the path opens slightly to reveal a thatched roof hut and stone lantern ahead.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open village clearing with thatched hut

agents.ego_description: walking past the thatched hut and stone lanterns along the widening path

entered.detail: wooden cart or wagon parked near the trees
dense forest trees marking the edge of the village

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a village clearing with a prominent thatched roof hut on the right. The character passes stone lanterns and approaches the forest edge. The wooden buildings of the narrow alley fall behind as the path leads toward denser woodland.

events.description: crosses wooden footbridge over the stream

agents.ego_description: walking through the forest and crossing the wooden bridge over the flowing stream

entered.detail: simple wooden plank bridge crossing the stream
flowing waterway running through the forest
waterfall cascading down rocky cliffs in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path enters a dense forest area where a wooden footbridge crosses a flowing stream. The character walks across the bridge as a waterfall becomes visible in the distance, cascading down rocky cliffs. The village structures are left behind as the environment becomes more natural and rugged.

events.description: begins ascending rocky terrain alongside the waterfall
reaches rocky overlook and stops to survey the valley

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky path beside the waterfall and reaching the overlook to observe the valley

entered.detail: large rock formation serving as viewpoint
expansive view of forested valley below

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a rocky hillside path alongside the waterfall, climbing over boulders to reach a high vantage point. From the rocky outcrop, the view opens to reveal a vast forested valley below. The waterfall drops to the left as the character stands overlooking the expansive natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed architecture of a rural village into a vast, rugged mountain vista. It begins by following the character through a narrow alley between traditional wooden houses and stone walls, moving past red banner poles toward a thatched roof hut. As the path opens into a village clearing, the camera leaves the wooden buildings behind and pushes forward into a dense forest. The scene then shifts as the character crosses a wooden footbridge over a flowing stream, with the environment becoming increasingly natural and rugged as a distant waterfall appears. Finally, the camera ascends a rocky hillside, climbing over boulders alongside the cascading water to reach a high vantage point overlooking an expansive forested valley.
